name: hacienda-anno-rag
description: Local RAG memory for Claude. Ingest documents, search offline. First use: ask me to 'Set up anno-rag' to download models (~970 MB).

user_config.name: Models directory
user_config.description: Path to downloaded model files. Leave blank and ask me to 'Set up anno-rag' to download automatically.

user_config.name: Vault passphrase
user_config.description: Leave blank to use the OS keyring (recommended). Only set for headless or scripted use.

user_config.name: Block model downloads
user_config.description: Prevent all network model downloads. Enable after models are downloaded.

user_config.name: Tesseract path (optional)
user_config.description: Path to the tesseract executable for OCR support. Leave blank to disable OCR.
